title: Naruto Themed Totem
description: A Simple Minecraft Naruto Totem Texture Pack Made For Anime Fans...
body:
**A simple Minecraft Naruto Totem Texture Pack made for anime fans who want a clean and minimal Naruto-themed look in their game. It replaces the Totem of Undying with a Naruto-inspired design while keeping the classic Minecraft style.

This texture pack works with Minecraft versions 1.16 to 1.21.11 and is made by **battlezent**. It is lightweight, easy to use, and perfect for players who want a small anime touch without changing the whole game.**

![Preview]![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45c8cf25c732c6b2f2ab16dd4ff777d2698374fa_0.webp)
